Director of QA Engineering

VerifyTech Solutions seeks an experienced Director of QA Engineering to lead our growing QA

organization through the next phase of scaling and innovation. You will oversee a team of 15-20 QA

engineers, managers, and automation specialists, defining testing strategy, driving architectural

improvements to our testing frameworks, and ensuring our clients receive world-class quality

assurance services. This role demands strategic thinking, strong people leadership, and deep

technical expertise in modern testing technologies. You'll collaborate closely with product,
engineering, and operations leadership to embed quality into every stage of the software
development lifecycle.

About the Company

VerifyTech Solutions is a rapidly growing software quality assurance and testing automation company

founded in 2015. We empower mid-market and enterprise clients across fintech, healthcare, and e-
commerce to deliver bug-free, high-performance applications through cutting-edge testing
frameworks, continuous integration pipelines, and intelligent test automation. With 200+ employees

and offices in San Francisco and Austin, we're committed to transforming how organizations
approach quality engineering.

What You'll Own

1. Lead, mentor, and develop a team of 15-20 QA professionals, including 2-3 QA managers and

individual contributors at various levels; establish career paths and conduct performance
reviews

2. Define QA strategy and roadmap aligned with company objectives, including framework

modernization, shift-left testing initiatives, and cost optimization across testing infrastructure

3. Architect and oversee the evolution of the testing tech stack (Playwright, Cypress, Selenium,
Postman, custom Python/JavaScript frameworks) to ensure scalability and maintainability

4. Build and maintain robust CI/CD test pipelines integrating with Jenkins, GitHub Actions, and

cloud platforms; ensure 24/7 reliability and sub-minute feedback loops

5. Drive quality metrics definition and reporting; establish KPIs for test coverage, defect escape

rates, and testing efficiency across all client engagements

at VerifyTech Solutions — Ensuring software excellence through intelligent, scalable QA innovationSan Francisco, CA (hybrid) • Full-time • $280,000 - $420,000 USD 6. Partner with VP of Engineering and Product leadership to implement quality gates and shift-left

testing practices across the product development organization

7. Oversee budget planning, vendor management, and tool licensing for testing infrastructure;

evaluate and adopt emerging technologies to maintain competitive advantage

8. Lead recruitment, onboarding, and knowledge transfer initiatives to scale the QA team; build a

culture of continuous learning and technical excellence

9. Conduct quarterly business reviews with key enterprise clients; present testing insights, quality

trends, and strategic recommendations to executive stakeholders

Required

Preferred

12+ years of QA engineering experience,

Experience with advanced testing

with minimum 5+ years in people

methodologies (behavior-driven

management or director-level leadership

development, property-based testing,

chaos engineering)
Familiarity with API testing tools (Postman,
REST Assured) and performance/load
testing frameworks
Background in agile/scrum methodologies
and experience implementing quality-first

practices in fast-moving environments
Track record of cost optimization in testing
infrastructure and tool management across
large organizations

roles managing managers
Deep hands-on expertise with multiple test
automation frameworks (Playwright,
Cypress, and/or Selenium); proven ability
to architect scalable test solutions
Strong proficiency in

scripting/programming (Python or
JavaScript) to design testing utilities,
custom reporters, and test infrastructure
components
Expert-level knowledge of CI/CD pipelines,
containerization (Docker), and cloud
testing platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
Demonstrated experience building and

scaling QA teams; track record of

recruiting, developing talent, and creating
high-performing engineering cultures
Executive presence and ability to
communicate complex technical concepts
to non-technical stakeholders and C-level
executives

Technologies

Playwright

  Cypress   Selenium   Postman   Python   JavaScript

  Jenkins   GitHub Actions

Docker

  AWS

 Perks & Benefits

Competitive equity package (stock options) with 4-year vesting

Comprehensive health insurance (medical, dental, vision) with company subsidies covering

90% of premiums

Unlimited PTO plus 12 paid company holidays and parental leave (16 weeks for birth parent, 12

weeks for non-birth parent)

Professional development budget ($5,000/year) for certifications, conferences, and training

programs

Flexible hybrid work (2 days minimum in-office, rest remote) with fully equipped home office

stipend ($2,000 one-time)

401(k) plan with 4% company match, immediately vested

Annual performance bonus (15-25% of base salary based on company and individual metrics)

Mental health support including subsidized therapy and wellness programs; on-site gym access

and yoga classes

Next Steps

To apply, submit your resume, a cover letter describing your leadership philosophy and approach to
scaling QA teams, and optionally a portfolio of QA frameworks or testing infrastructure you've
architected to careers@verifytechsolutions.com. Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis.
Final candidates will complete a technical panel interview with our VP of Engineering and two senior
QA leads, followed by an executive interview with our CEO.
